case_title: BURYN, THADDEUS (TED) J. VS MCCARTHY, KEVIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY BURYN, THADDEUS (TED) J. AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARTHY, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARTHY, KEVIN
CERT MAIL OF PLTF'S CLAIM SENT TO KEVIN MCCARTHY RETURNED--UNCLAIMED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURYN, THADDEUS (TED) J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCARTHY, KEVIN $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,276.00, DEFENDANT'S NAME IS CORRECTED TO:MCCARTHY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE OF PLTF FILED ON 3/23/00 RETURNED WITH INSTRUCTION TO FILE A REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT.
PLTF'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER AFTER 15 DAYS. COPIES SENT TO BOTH PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURYN, THADDEUS (TED) J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCARTHY, KEVIN $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $74.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,324.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLFT'S MOTION TO CORRECT JUDGMENT GRANTED. NOTICED SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
